title: ProductAgreedTermAndConditionTypeValues
description: Negotiated Terms and Conditions for Sold Banking Products

x-enumeration-literals.name: Pricing Term and Condition
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Interest Rate: Adjusted rate based on negotiation or customer profile    
Benchmark Margin: Custom spread over MCLR, SOFR, etc.    
FX Rate Margin: Special forex rate offered
Fee Waivers/Discounts: Discount or waiver of charges

x-enumeration-literals.name: Fee-Related Term and Condition
x-enumeration-literals.description:
- Processing Fee: Waived or reduced
- Annual/Renewal Fees: Discounted or removed
- Foreclosure Charges:Reduced or eliminated
- Prepayment Penalty: Customized repayment terms

x-enumeration-literals.name: Limit and Exposure Term and Condition
x-enumeration-literals.description:
- Credit Limit: Higher/lower limit based on profile
- Withdrawal Limits: Increased ATM or POS limits
- Overdraft or Cash Credit Limits: Overdraft or cash credit customization

x-enumeration-literals.name: Security and Collateral Term and Condition
x-enumeration-literals.description:
- Collateral Requirement: Waived or substituted
- Guarantee Conditions: Flexible guarantor terms (e.g., Personal guarantee replaced with corporate)

x-enumeration-literals.name: Bundling and Relationship-Based Term and Condition
x-enumeration-literals.description:
- Bundled Products: Cross-sell combinations at special terms (e.g., Loan + insurance bundle with premium waived)
- Multi-Product Pricing: Special pricing for relationship customers
- Group or Family Terms: Applied across accounts or family members

x-enumeration-literals.name: Renewal and Review Term and Condition
x-enumeration-literals.description:
- Auto-Renewal Terms: Customized rollover rules
- Review Frequency: Relaxed reporting frequency

x-enumeration-literals.name: Contractual or Legal Term and Condition
x-enumeration-literals.description:
- Dispute Resolution: Arbitration or jurisdiction agreed upon
- Governing Law: Customized legal framework
- Exit or Termination Clause: Custom exit conditions

x-enumeration-literals.name: Confidential Term and Condition
x-enumeration-literals.description:
- Confidential Pricing: Not disclosed publicly
- Volume-Based Commitments: Customer commits minimum usage
- Rebate Clauses: Linked to performance
